name: Nutcracker Sweets
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly butter a jelly-roll pan.
2. In a large bowl, combine popcorn, pecans, almonds, and melted butter. Sprinkle lightly with salt. Spread in the buttered pan.
3. In a medium heavy saucepan, combine sugar, 1/2 cup butter, and corn syrup. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, stirring constantly.
4. Continue boiling for 5-10 minutes or until the mixture turns a light caramel color, stirring occasionally.
5. Remove from heat; stir in vanilla.
6. Pour over popcorn and nuts. Toss to coat.
7. Spread out to cool and harden.
8. Break apart and store in a loosely covered container.
Makes 8 cups.
